lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name, one does not fall into hell.
The Lord abides in everyone.
The Lord illumines each and every heart.
Within my mind is the Support of the Lord.
The Lord is the boat to cross over the world-ocean.
Serving the Lord, all fruitful rewards are obtained. ||1||
Chant the Lord's Name, and the Messenger of Death will run away.
The Lord breaks the teeth of Maya, the witch. ||2||
The Lord has revealed His glory.
The Lord is forever and ever the Forgiver.
The Lord blesses us with peace and bliss.
The Lord is the mother and father of His Saint. ||3||
The Lord, the Lord, is in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
Time and time again, I sing the Lord's Praises.
Meeting with the Guru, I have attained the incomprehensible object.
Slave Nanak has grasped the Support of the Lord. ||4||17||19||
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
One who is protected by the Protector Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਮਹਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: maat garabh meh agan na johai |
lines.english: In the mother's womb, the fire does not touch him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਪੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohu na pohai |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment do not affect him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਅੰਗੁ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa ang kare nirankaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - the Formless Lord is on his side. ||1||Pause||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he meditates on the Formless Lord.
Dust is thrown into the faces of the slanderers. ||1||
The Lord's protective spell is the armor of His slave.
God is the Sanctuary of His humble slave. ||2||
The wicked, evil demons cannot even touch him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਗਰਬੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo garab kare so jaae |
lines.english: Whoever indulges in egotistical pride, shall waste away to ruin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਦਾਸੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਅਪਣੈ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: so daas rakhiaa apanai kantth laae |
lines.english: - He saves that slave, hugging him close in His embrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo saran peaa har raae |
lines.english: Whoever enters the Sanctuary of the Sovereign Lord
Whoever takes great pride in himself,
The True Lord is, and shall always be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰੁਲਤਾ ਖਾਕੂ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ohu khin meh rulataa khaakoo naal |3|
lines.english: in an instant, shall be like dust mixing with dust. ||3||
Forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to Him.
Granting His Mercy, He saves His slaves.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
God is the Support of Nanak's breath of life. ||4||18||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਹੁ ਬੂਢਾ ਨਾ ਇਹੁ ਬਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa ihu boodtaa naa ihu baalaa |
lines.english: He is not old; He is not young.
The Supreme Lord God. ||Pause||
Wondrous and beautiful is the description of the beauty of the Supreme Soul,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਦੂਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਮ ਜਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa is dookh nahee jam jaalaa |
lines.english: He is not in pain; He is not caught in Death's noose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਹੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨਾ ਇਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa ihu binasai naa ihu jaae |
lines.english: He does not die; He does not go away.
In the beginning, and throughout the ages, He is permeating everywhere. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਦੁਸਮਨੁ ਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਮੀਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa is dusaman naa is meet |
lines.english: He has no enemy; He has no friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਉਸਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਇਸੁ ਸੀਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa is usan nahee is seet |
lines.english: He is not hot; He is not cold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਹਰਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਇਸੁ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa is harakh nahee is sog |
lines.english: He is not happy; He is not sad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਇਸ ਕਾ ਇਹੁ ਕਰਨੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh is kaa ihu karanai jog |2|
lines.english: Everything belongs to Him; He can do anything. ||2||
He is beyond the beyond, and has always been so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਬਾਪੁ ਨਹੀ ਇਸੁ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa is baap nahee is maaeaa |
lines.english: He has no father; He has no mother.
From the three qualities, the one mechanism of Maya was produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਪੁੰਨ ਕਾ ਇਸੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: paap pun kaa is lep na laagai |
lines.english: He is not affected by virtue or vice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਜਾਗੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar sad hee jaagai |3|
lines.english: Deep within each and every heart, He is always awake and aware. ||3||
He is merciful to the meek, forever compassionate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਹੈ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa maaeaa taa kee hai chhaaeaa |
lines.english: The great Maya is only His shadow.
He is undeceivable, impenetrable, unfathomable and merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee gat mit kachhoo na paae |
lines.english: His state and limits cannot ever be known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੯॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kai bal bal jaae |4|19|21|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice, a sacrifice to Him. ||4||19||21||
